This installation bundles cdrdao, the CD writer BinCue Studio drives to burn
discs. cdrdao is a separate program, not part of BinCue Studio.

  cdrdao 1.2.6
  https://github.com/cdrdao/cdrdao
  Copyright the cdrdao authors.
  Licensed under the GNU General Public License, version 2 or later (GPLv2+).

The bundled files (cdrdao.exe and its msys-*.dll runtime) are the official
prebuilt Windows binaries from that project's 1.2.6 release
(https://github.com/cdrdao/cdrdao/releases/tag/rel_1_2_6). The complete
corresponding source code is available at the same repository and release.

The GPL license text is available at https://www.gnu.org/licenses/gpl-2.0.html
